title: Poise skirt
body_html:
A sleek, tailored skirt crafted from handwoven dupion silk, designed to bring structure and ease into perfect harmony.

The natural slub texture of dupion lends a refined sheen, while the straight silhouette elongates the form with quiet confidence. A clean front slit adds movement and soft sensuality, making the piece both elegant and effortlessly wearable.

Versatile enough for elevated evenings or refined daytime dressing, this skirt pairs seamlessly with coordinated tops or stands strong on its own.

Fabric: 100% Handwoven Dupion Silk
Color: Deep Red
Fit: Straight silhouette with front slit

title: Kairo pants
body_html:
Cut from rich handwoven dupion silk, these wide-leg trousers offer a refined balance of structure and fluidity.
The natural slub texture of dupion gives the pants a subtle sheen and a tactile depth, while the relaxed silhouette ensures effortless movement and ease. Designed with a clean waistband and straight fall, they elevate everyday dressing with quiet sophistication.

A versatile essential crafted for comfort, polish, and timeless appeal.

Fabric: 100% Handwoven Dupion Silk
Color: Teal
Fit: Relaxed, wide-leg

body_html:
Trousers follow in clean, straight lines, creating an elongated silhouette that moves effortlessly with the wearer. From every angle, front, profile, or back, the cut holds its structure without ever feeling stiff.

Limited stock remaining across sizes — won't be restocked at this price.

Fit note: True to size, straight through the leg. Care: Dry clean recommended.

title: Waraq shirt
body_html:
A soft beige short-sleeve shirt adorned with a delicate hand-drawn botanical print. Airy, comfortable, and effortlessly polished. Perfect for underdressing or layering open over a tee.

Last piece in stock (size M) — this print won't be restocked.

Fit note: Relaxed fit, true to size. Care: Machine wash cold, line dry.

title: Safar shirt
body_html:
A lightweight short-sleeve shirt featuring an abstract splatter print over a deep black base. Soft, breathable, and tailored for everyday ease, it pairs as easily with denim as it does with tailored trousers.

Last piece in stock (size M) — this print won't be restocked.

Fit note: Relaxed fit, true to size. Care: Machine wash cold, line dry.

title: Arlo top
body_html:
A refined top crafted from 100% handwoven dupion silk in a soft natural beige.
The relaxed shirt features a sharp collar, deep V-placket, and tapered cuffs. Lightweight, breathable, and subtly lustrous, this brings comfort and sophistication together in a timeless everyday essential.

Fabric: 100% Handwoven Dupion Silk
Color: Natural Beige
Fit: Relaxed shirt

title: Dune dress
body_html:
An ode to ease and quiet structure this dress is where minimalism meets movement.
Cut from lustrous handwoven silk, the silhouette falls in a single, uninterrupted sweep, grazing the ankles with an elegance that feels instinctive. The neckline opens into a soft V, drawing the eye upward, while the dropped shoulders and gently sculpted sleeves create volume without weight.

Side slits release the hem just enough to let the fabric breathe and follow the body’s natural rhythm. Whether in the deep teal or the muted stone-grey, each hue reveals silk’s subtle sheen, a quiet glow that shifts with light and motion.

Unfussy, refined, and endlessly wearable, this is a dress for the woman who finds confidence in simplicity, and beauty in the unforced.

A study in calm, clean lines and luxurious restraint.

title: Halo dress
body_html:
A dress that drapes like a slow blooming dusk deep, warm, and impossibly fluid.
Crafted in rich wine-toned silk, it falls in cascading layers that seem to float around the body, catching every movement like a soft echo. The strapless neckline reveals the shoulders with quiet confidence, while the asymmetric overlays create a sculptural rhythm shifting, folding, and unfolding as if the fabric were alive.

From behind, the silhouette lengthens into a gentle sweep, each layer sheer at the edges, offering depth without weight. There is a poetry in its simplicity no embellishment, no excess, only form, fall, and the luxurious texture of silk speaking for itself.

A piece for evenings that demand presence without noise a garment that moves not just with you, but for you.

A study in elegance, shadow, and effortless drama.

Only 3 pieces left — once they're gone, this run won't be repeated.

title: Sol dress
body_html:
A fluid, strappy dress in a deep ruby red, crafted from airy chanderi silk that brings a natural sheen and effortless movement.
Designed with a softly contoured neckline and slender shoulder straps, the bodice follows the form with subtle structure before releasing into a long, flowing skirt. The fabric’s lightweight translucence adds depth and softness, especially through the hem, allowing the silhouette to move with quiet grace from every angle.

A refined, feminine statement that embodies ease, allure, and timeless simplicity.

Fabric: Chanderi Silk
Color: Ruby Red
Fit: Fitted strappy bodice with a flared, fluid skirt

title: Jhilmil Top
body_html: There are "day outfits" and "night outfits". And then there's Jhilmil - designed to do both. Light, breathable viscose linen. Sleeveless, softly tailored. A round neck framed with wooden buttons. Pair it with trousers when you want something more formal and swap it for a skirt to give your ensemble some twirl. One piece. All day. Every way.

title: Boond Shorts
body_html: The Boond Skort likes to tag along, no matter where you're going. Light, breathable viscose-linen in a crisp A-line cut, with pleats that dance when you do. Deep pockets hold your phone, your lip balm, and that seashell you picked up for your journal. Boond gives you the elegance of a skirt with the convenience of shorts.

Side pockets keep your hands (and essentials) happy. Mid-rise, comfortable, and ready for anything from beach to breakfast buffet - no outfit overthinking required.

body_html:
Effortless style meets relaxed confidence in this elevated co-ord. Designed to work as a set or separately, its ultra-light cotton dobby fabric moves with your day — from casual brunches to creative work hours.
Why you'll love it: breathable, textured feel with a modern silhouette that flatters every frame.
Perfect for: weekend planning, coffee runs, city strolls.

Fit note: Relaxed fit, true to size. Care: Machine wash cold, line dry. Exchange: Easy 7-day size exchange.

title: Gulmohar Dress
body_html:
The kind of dress you can wear all day without wishing you’d brought a change. Soft, structured viscose-linen with a square neckline, wide straps, and a waist that knows how to flatter sans-fuss. Light enough for a summer stroll, chic enough for when you bump into the cute guy from your pottery class on the way.

Fit note: True to size, fitted waist with a flared skirt. Care: Hand wash cold, dry in shade. Exchange: Easy 7-day size exchange.
